subject: session date
fact: The session takes place on June 14th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jun 14th, 2026

subject: rogue Mind Illayer's lair
fact: The party pressed onward through twisted corridors deep within the rogue Mind Illayer's lair.
source_quote: Deep within the rogue Mind Illayer's lair, the party pressed onward through its twisted corridors

subject: moss-covered chamber
fact: The party found an unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum in a moss-covered chamber.
source_quote: uncovering a moss-covered chamber where they found an unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was found unconscious by the party.
source_quote: they found an unconscious Duergar named Thera Grabelthum

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: she confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Zhentarim Black Network
fact: Thera Grabelthum was spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: she confessed to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Thera Grabelthum turns invisible
fact: Thera Grabelthum turned invisible and fled into the darkness.
source_quote: Thera turned invisible and fled into the darkness

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush.
source_quote: two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a sudden ambush

subject: Githyanki warrior
fact: A slain Githyanki warrior's skull cracked open to reveal an intellect devourer.
source_quote: a slain warrior's skull cracked open to reveal an intellect devourer

subject: intellect devourer
fact: An intellect devourer unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless.
source_quote: unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless

subject: intellect devourer
fact: The intellect devourer was destroyed after a fierce struggle.
source_quote: the creature was destroyed

subject: Githyanki warrior
fact: The remaining Githyanki warrior fled.
source_quote: the remaining Githyanki warrior fled

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was killed in the chaos.
source_quote: Thera was killed in the chaos

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was healed after the ambush.
source_quote: With the ambush behind them and the Owlbear healed

subject: freezing chamber
fact: The party discovered a freezing chamber kept cold by towering columns of ice.
source_quote: They discovered a freezing chamber kept cold by towering columns of ice

subject: massive block of opaque ice
fact: A massive block of opaque ice sat at the center of the freezing chamber.
source_quote: at the center of which sat a massive block of opaque ice

subject: suspended brains
fact: The massive block of opaque ice preserved suspended brains.
source_quote: preserving suspended brains

subject: vials of yellowish liquid
fact: The massive block of opaque ice preserved small vials of yellowish liquid.
source_quote: small vials of yellowish liquid

subject: hidden copper plate
fact: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings lay tucked within the freezing chamber.
source_quote: A hidden copper plate emblazoned with alien markings lay tucked within the room

subject: suspicious chest
fact: A suspicious chest sat nearby in the freezing chamber.
source_quote: a suspicious chest sat nearby

subject: party leaves chest alone
fact: The party chose to leave the suspicious chest alone.
source_quote: the party wisely chose to leave alone

subject: short rest
fact: The party took a short rest to recover their strength.
source_quote: After a short rest to recover their strength

subject: unlocking doors
fact: The party placed the brains they had collected at each of the sealed doors to unlock the path.
source_quote: they placed the brains they had collected at each of the sealed doors, unlocking the path

subject: Mind Illayer's innermost sanctum
fact: The path led to the Mind Illayer's innermost sanctum.
source_quote: unlocking the path to the Mind Illayer's innermost sanctum

subject: Mind Illayer's innermost sanctum
fact: The walls of the innermost sanctum were festooned with graven images of skulls and brains.
source_quote: its walls festooned with graven images of skulls and brains of every size

subject: decorative brain jars
fact: Three tall, decorative brain jars stood at the center of the innermost sanctum.
source_quote: Three tall, decorative brain jars stood at the center of the room

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought, the mad Mind Illayer, sat in the innermost sanctum sipping from a grisly jar.
source_quote: sat Rogue Thought — the mad Mind Illayer they had come to destroy

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought declared that he had been waiting for the party for a very long time.
source_quote: declared that he had been waiting for them for a very long time

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Four Githyanki warriors flanked Rogue Thought.
source_quote: Flanking him were four Githyanki warriors

subject: battle erupts
fact: The battle erupted immediately when one Githyanki warrior screamed that their master wished the party dead.
source_quote: one of whom immediately screamed that their master wished the party dead

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Rogue Thought identified Bramgrim as the greatest magical threat through his mind-reading.
source_quote: whom he had identified through his mind-reading as the greatest magical threat

subject: Bramgrim summons guardians
fact: Bramgrim summoned a storm of spectral guardians that scorched the warriors with holy energy.
source_quote: summoning a storm of spectral guardians that scorched the warriors with holy energy

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas loosed precise and punishing arrows from across the chamber.
source_quote: Akritas loosed precise and punishing arrows from across the chamber

subject: Githyanki teleport
fact: Two of the Githyanki warriors used their innate ability to teleport away from the spectral guardians.
source_quote: Two of the Githyanki warriors used their innate ability to teleport away from the spectral guardians

subject: Owlbear charges
fact: The Owlbear charged through the far door and crashed into Rogue Thought.
source_quote: The Owlbear charged through the far door and crashed into Rogue Thought himself

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: The Owlbear delivered a powerful strike that visibly staggered Rogue Thought.
source_quote: delivering a powerful strike that visibly staggered the ancient creature

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur unleashed a massive fireball that engulfed the Mind Illayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: he unleashed a massive fireball that roared through the chamber and engulfed the Mind Illayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior

subject: Rogue Thought severed tentacles
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles and dropped them to the ground.
source_quote: he severed his own tentacles, dropped them to the ground

subject: Rogue Thought escapes
fact: Rogue Thought vanished in a flash of planar magic, escaping to another dimension entirely.
source_quote: vanished in a flash of planar magic, escaping to another dimension entirely

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought warned that he and Graz'zt would have their revenge.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior with a burst of necrotic energy.
source_quote: Bramgrim finished off the last surviving Githyanki warrior with a burst of necrotic energy

subject: Rogue Thought's severed tentacles
fact: The party collected Rogue Thought's severed tentacles as proof of their victory.
source_quote: The party collected Rogue Thought's severed tentacles as proof of their victory

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz traveled alongside the party one last time to Sporedome.
source_quote: with Arrizz traveling alongside them one last time

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz paused at the edge of the fungal city to offer his farewell.
source_quote: At the edge of the fungal city, the dry-witted drow paused and offered his farewell

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz said he hoped never to see the party again, but if he did, it would be because they were coming to save him.
source_quote: he hoped never to see them again, but if he did, he was certain it would be because they were coming to save him

subject: Mind Illayer who hired the party
fact: The Mind Illayer who hired them received the tentacles without ceremony.
source_quote: The Mind Illayer who had hired them received the tentacles without ceremony

subject: reward for party
fact: The Mind Illayer rewarded the party with powerful magical gifts.
source_quote: rewarded the party with powerful magical gifts

subject: Order of the Gauntlet
fact: The Mind Illayer promised to pass vital intelligence about Graz'zt's operations to the Order of the Gauntlet.
source_quote: promising to pass vital intelligence about Graz'zt's operations to the Order of the Gauntlet

subject: Order of the Gauntlet
fact: The Order of the Gauntlet is the only faction the Mind Illayer trusted enough to deal with directly.
source_quote: the only faction the creature trusted enough to deal with directly

subject: Hillsfar
fact: The party returned to Hillsfar on the surface.
source_quote: Back on the surface, the party returned to Hillsfar

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the city's powerful and influential criminal matriarch.
source_quote: Isthana, the city's powerful and influential criminal matriarch

subject: private dinner invitation
fact: The party was promptly invited to a private dinner by Isthana.
source_quote: were promptly invited to a private dinner by Isthana

subject: three bottles of rare wine
fact: Three bottles of rare wine were served as a personal gift to Felkur.
source_quote: three bottles of rare wine — a personal gift to Felkur

subject: business proposal
fact: The party floated the idea of starting a business in the city.
source_quote: the party floated the idea of starting a business in the city

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana warned that any business under her patronage would thrive.
source_quote: any business under her patronage would thrive

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana warned that any venture without her support would find the city a very difficult place to operate.
source_quote: any venture without her support would find the city a very difficult place to operate

subject: dinner conclusion
fact: The party left the dinner without signing anything.
source_quote: left the dinner without signing anything

subject: future arrangements with Isthana
fact: The door remained open for future arrangements with Isthana.
source_quote: though the door remained open for future arrangements

subject: Graz'zt's revenge
fact: Rogue Thought warned that he and Graz'zt would have their revenge.
source_quote: both he and Graz'zt would have their revenge

fact: The evening ended with a telepathic message arriving for Akritas.

fact: The Emerald Enclave sent a telepathic message to Akritas.
source_quote: a telepathic message arriving for Akritas from the Emerald Enclave

fact: The fire giants have turned their eyes toward the Dalelands and Hillsfar.
source_quote: had turned their eyes toward the surface — toward the Dalelands and Hillsfar itself

source_quote: The brain-capped mushrooms the party had secured were holding back the worst of Graz'zt's madness

fact: The Drow resistance is led by the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv.

fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a wizard.

fact: The party was called to travel to Szith Morcane to stop the giants.

fact: Arrizz gave a dry-witted farewell to the party.

fact: Arrizz is a drow.

fact: Hillsfar is a major surface city.
source_quote: A major surface city

subject: Szith Morcane
fact: Szith Morcane is a location mentioned in the Emerald Enclave's message as being near an abundance of Faerzress.
source_quote: A location mentioned in the Emerald Enclave's message as being near an abundance of Faerzress

subject: Fire giants
fact: Fire giants currently control Szith Morcane.
source_quote: currently controlled by fire giants

subject: Fire giants
fact: The fire giants in Szith Morcane are nearing completion of their work.
source_quote: who are nearing completion of their work

subject: Fire giants
fact: The fire giants in Szith Morcane are threatening to invade the surface.
source_quote: and threatening to invade the surface

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz is a drow previously encountered by the party.
source_quote: A drow previously encountered by the party

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was found bound and tormented in the lair.
source_quote: who was found bound and tormented in the lair

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was suffering from demonic madness that was cured by a piece of magical mushroom.
source_quote: suffering from demonic madness that was cured by a piece of magical mushroom

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz agreed to travel with the party briefly in exchange for a beer.
source_quote: he agreed to travel with the party briefly in exchange for a beer

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a wizard the party is tasked with linking up with in Szith Morcane.
source_quote: the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was found unconscious in a moss-covered chamber.
source_quote: A Duergar found unconscious in a moss-covered chamber

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum initially claimed to be an innocent traveler.
source_quote: who initially claimed to be an innocent traveler

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum admitted to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network under intimidation.
source_quote: Under intimidation, she admitted to spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum turned invisible and fled during the ambush.
source_quote: She turned invisible and fled during the ambush

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was killed in the chaos.
source_quote: but was killed in the chaos

subject: Zhentarim Black Network
fact: Thera Grabelthum was spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: spying on Duergar operations for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: Githyanki Warriors used greatswords and teleportation to fight the party.
source_quote: who used greatswords and teleportation to fight the party

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: Some Githyanki Warriors served as guards in the lair.
source_quote: Some served as guards in the lair

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: Some Githyanki Warriors were found tormenting Arrizz.
source_quote: while others were found tormenting Arrizz

subject: Githyanki skull cracking
fact: One Githyanki warrior's skull cracked open to reveal a hidden intellect devourer.
source_quote: One of their skulls cracked open to reveal a hidden intellect devourer

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: An intellect devourer emerged from a slain Githyanki warrior's cracked skull.
source_quote: that emerged from a slain Githyanki warrior's cracked skull

subject: Intellect Devourer psychic blast
fact: The intellect devourer unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless.
source_quote: It unleashed a devastating psychic blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless

subject: Intellect Devourer destruction
fact: The intellect devourer was destroyed by the party.
source_quote: before being destroyed by the party

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought was a mad Mind Flayer found in his inner sanctum sipping from decorative brain jars.
source_quote: A mad Mind Flayer found in his inner sanctum sipping from decorative brain jars

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought was served by Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: He was served by Githyanki warriors

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought appeared to have been blessed by Graz'zt.
source_quote: appeared to have been blessed by Graz'zt

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought communicated telepathically.
source_quote: and communicated telepathically

subject: Rogue Thought tentacle severing
fact: When brought near death by the party, Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles.
source_quote: When brought near death by the party, he severed his own tentacles

subject: Rogue Thought plane shift
fact: Rogue Thought plane shifted away after severing his tentacles.
source_quote: and plane shifted away

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought vowed revenge after escaping.
source_quote: vowing revenge

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was stunned by the intellect devourer's psychic blast.
source_quote: who was stunned by the intellect devourer's psychic blast

subject: Owlbear healing
fact: The Owlbear was healed during a short rest.
source_quote: healed during a short rest

subject: Owlbear final charge
fact: The Owlbear charged into the final chamber to deliver a powerful strike against Rogue Thought.
source_quote: and then charged into the final chamber to deliver a powerful strike against Rogue Thought

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is a drow archmage referenced at the end of the session.
source_quote: A drow archmage referenced at the end of the session

subject: Solom Ned'razak declaration
fact: Solom Ned'razak declared that the time had come to move against Graz'zt in Maerimydra.
source_quote: who declared that the time had come to move against Graz'zt in Maerimydra

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the powerful and influential head of the criminal element in Hillsfar.
source_quote: The powerful and influential head of the criminal element in Hillsfar

subject: Isthana dinner invitation
fact: Isthana invited the party to a private dinner.
source_quote: who invited the party to a private dinner

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana offered patronage and protection for any business the party might start.
source_quote: She offered patronage and protection for any business they might start

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana made clear that ventures without her support would not fare well.
source_quote: making clear that ventures without her support would not fare well

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana sought to co-opt the party as powerful assets for the city.
source_quote: and sought to co-opt the party as powerful assets for the city

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a Drow wizard mentioned in the Emerald Enclave's message.
source_quote: A Drow wizard mentioned in the Emerald Enclave's message

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv has returned to his people.
source_quote: as having returned to his people

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is ready to receive the party at Szith Morcane.
source_quote: and being ready to receive the party at Szith Morcane

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv intends to lead the resistance against the fire giants.
source_quote: to lead the resistance against the fire giants

subject: Magical Mushroom
fact: The party used a piece of fungi to cure Arrizz of his demonic madness.
source_quote: A piece of fungi used by the party to cure Arrizz of his demonic madness

subject: Opals
fact: Two gemstones worth 25 gold pieces each were discovered among the treasures in the lair.
source_quote: Two gemstones worth 25 gold pieces each, discovered among the treasures in the lair

subject: Circlet
fact: An ornate headpiece worth 250 gold pieces was discovered by the party while searching the lair.
source_quote: An ornate headpiece worth 250 gold pieces discovered by the party while searching the lair

subject: Chainmail Pouch
fact: A small pouch containing 35 gold pieces was found among the loot in the lair.
source_quote: A small pouch containing 35 gold pieces, found among the loot in the lair

subject: Copper Plate
fact: A beaten copper plate emblazoned with strange otherworldly symbols on one side was found hidden within the icy chamber.
source_quote: A beaten copper plate emblazoned with strange otherworldly symbols on one side, found hidden within the icy chamber

subject: Brains
fact: Biological specimens were found preserved in ice and jars throughout the lair.
source_quote: Biological specimens found preserved in ice and jars throughout the lair

subject: Brain unlocking
fact: The party collected enough brains to place one at each of the magically sealed doors, unlocking entry to the final chamber.
source_quote: The party collected enough of them to place one at each of the magically sealed doors, unlocking entry to the final chamber

subject: Brain Jars
fact: Tall, decorative containers were used by Rogue Thought for his meals.
source_quote: Tall, decorative containers from which Rogue Thought was consuming his grisly meals when the party entered his chamber

subject: Mind Flayer Tentacles
fact: Rogue Thought severed his tentacles before he escaped via plane shift.
source_quote: Severed from Rogue Thought before he escaped via plane shift

subject: Tentacle presentation
fact: The party presented the severed tentacles to the Mind Flayer in Sporedome as proof of their victory over the rogue.
source_quote: The party presented these to the Mind Flayer in Sporedome as proof of their victory over the rogue

subject: Wand of the War Mage +2
fact: A powerful magical wand was gifted to Felkur by the Mind Flayer in Sporedome as a reward for defeating Rogue Thought.
source_quote: A powerful magical wand gifted to Felkur by the Mind Flayer in Sporedome as a reward for defeating Rogue Thought

subject: Rare Wine
fact: Three bottles of exquisite and rare wine were brought by Isthana as a gift to Felkur at their private dinner in Hillsfar.
source_quote: Three bottles of exquisite and rare wine brought by Isthana as a gift to Felkur at their private dinner in Hillsfar

subject: Brain-capped Mushrooms
fact: Magical fungi were referenced in the Emerald Enclave's message as having been secured by the party.
source_quote: Magical fungi referenced in the Emerald Enclave's message as having been secured by the party

subject: Spirit Guardians casting
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians multiple times throughout the session.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim multiple times throughout the session

subject: Spirit Guardians effect
fact: The spectral protectors surrounded Bramgrim and scorched nearby enemies with holy energy.
source_quote: The spectral protectors surrounded him and scorched nearby enemies with holy energy

subject: Spirit Guardians slowing
fact: Spirit Guardians slowed several Githyanki warriors who failed their saving throws.
source_quote: also slowing several Githyanki warriors who failed their saving throws

subject: Firebolt casting
fact: Felkur used Firebolt to incinerate the intellect devourer.
source_quote: Used by Felkur to incinerate the intellect devourer

subject: Firebolt damage
fact: Felkur used Firebolt to damage a Githyanki warrior during the ambush in the moss-covered chamber.
source_quote: and damage a Githyanki warrior during the ambush in the moss-covered chamber

subject: Spiritual Weapon summoning
fact: Bramgrim summoned Spiritual Weapon to manifest a floating weapon.
source_quote: Summoned by Bramgrim to manifest a floating weapon

subject: Spiritual Weapon attack
fact: The Spiritual Weapon attacked through walls of the lair to strike at enemies Bramgrim could not directly see.
source_quote: that could strike at enemies he could not directly see, attacking through walls of the lair

subject: Misty Step usage
fact: Multiple Githyanki warriors used Misty Step to instantly teleport across the battlefield.
source_quote: Used by multiple Githyanki warriors to instantly teleport across the battlefield

subject: Misty Step escape
fact: Githyanki warriors used Misty Step primarily to escape the reach of Bramgrim's spectral guardians.
source_quote: primarily to escape the reach of Bramgrim's spectral guardians

subject: Fireball casting
fact: Felkur unleashed Fireball in the final chamber.
source_quote: Unleashed by Felkur in the final chamber

subject: Fireball damage
fact: The Fireball caught the Mind Flayer and several Githyanki warriors in its blast radius, dealing heavy damage to most of them.
source_quote: the massive explosion of flame caught the Mind Flayer and several Githyanki warriors in its blast radius, dealing heavy damage to most of them

subject: Hunter's Mark application
fact: Akritas applied Hunter's Mark to track her target.
source_quote: Applied by Akritas to track her target

subject: Hunter's Mark effect
fact: Hunter's Mark increased the lethality of Akritas's arrow strikes during combat.
source_quote: and increase the lethality of her arrow strikes during combat

subject: Plane Shift usage
fact: Rogue Thought used Plane Shift to escape to another plane of existence when he was reduced to near death.
source_quote: Used by Rogue Thought to escape to another plane of existence when he was reduced to near death

subject: Plane Shift distraction
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles to leave behind as a distraction before using Plane Shift.
source_quote: after first severing his own tentacles to leave behind as a distraction

subject: Toll the Dead casting
fact: Bramgrim used Toll the Dead to finish off the last remaining Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: A potent cantrip used by Bramgrim to finish off the last remaining Githyanki warrior

subject: Toll the Dead damage
fact: Toll the Dead dealt heavy necrotic damage that proved lethal to the already-injured foe.
source_quote: dealing heavy necrotic damage that proved lethal to the already-injured foe
